page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. It features 12 physical cores and 12 virtual CPUs operating with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate average performance across standard compute and memory operations. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance score is 1577.28, while the multi-core score reaches 12473.75. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 698.81 GB/sec, dropping to 69.85 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and a write speed of 46.64 GB/sec. In database operations, the instance achieves a PassMark database score of 4736.01 and handles 11.99 million operations per second in Redis SET tests.

A notable performance tradeoff is observed in large language model inference, where the instance registers weak performance on medium 7B models, achieving 17.76 tokens/sec for prompt processing and 8.57 tokens/sec for text generation. This indicates the server is not optimized for complex AI workloads. However, its high memory density relative to CPU cores makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive applications that do not require local NVMe storage. The ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by a dedicated 12-core Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place the server in the average tier, with a multi-core stress-ng score of 12473.75 and a Redis SET throughput of 11.99 million operations per second. However, it exhibits weak performance in medium-sized LLM inference tasks. Given its high memory density and lack of local storage, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads rather than compute-heavy AI tasks. It is well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is a memory-optimized x86_64 server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.3xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 12 Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring high memory density and dedicated Intel Xeon processors for enterprise database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
96.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Strong performance in Redis SET operations and in-memory caching
Suited for memory-bound enterprise applications and databases
